hero.eyebrow: SELECT * FROM analyst WHERE impact = true;
hero.name: Rahul
hero.subtitle: I turn messy business data into decisions — dashboards, pipelines and forecasts for retail, supply chain and finance teams.

about.heading: About me
about.body: I'm a data analyst based in Magdeburg, Germany, with hands-on experience across retail, e-commerce, supply chain and finance/controlling. I build the layer between raw data and good decisions — from SQL data warehouses to Power BI dashboards and forecasting models. Previously at Flink, BASF New Business and TCS Deutschland. I hold an M.Eng. in International Business and Engineering from SRH Hochschule Heidelberg, and I'm currently building my German toward C1.

projects.heading: Projects
projects.subheading: A selection of end-to-end data work. Replace these with your real projects in the editor.

items.title: Modern Data Warehouse (MS SQL)
items.description: Designed and built an end-to-end SQL data warehouse with staging, star-schema modelling and SCD Type 2 handling for historical accuracy.

items.title: Retail KPI Dashboard
items.description: Built a Power BI dashboard tracking OTIF, LIFR and VOFR logistics KPIs for supply chain stakeholders, cutting manual reporting time significantly.

items.title: Text-to-SQL AI Agent
items.description: A natural-language query assistant that translates plain English questions into SQL, letting non-technical stakeholders explore data directly.

hero.eyebrow: SELECT * FROM analyst WHERE impact = true;
hero.name: Rahul
hero.subtitle: Ich verwandle unübersichtliche Geschäftsdaten in klare Entscheidungen — Dashboards, Pipelines und Prognosen für Teams aus Handel, Supply Chain und Finance.

about.heading: Über mich
about.body: Ich bin Data Analyst mit Sitz in Magdeburg und praktischer Erfahrung in Handel, E-Commerce, Supply Chain und Finance/Controlling. Ich baue die Brücke zwischen Rohdaten und guten Entscheidungen — von SQL-Data-Warehouses über Power-BI-Dashboards bis hin zu Prognosemodellen. Zuvor bei Flink, BASF New Business und TCS Deutschland. Ich habe einen M.Eng. in International Business and Engineering von der SRH Hochschule Heidelberg und arbeite aktuell an meinem Deutsch auf C1-Niveau.

items.description: Power-BI-Dashboard zur Verfolgung von OTIF-, LIFR- und VOFR-Logistik-KPIs für Supply-Chain-Stakeholder, das den manuellen Reporting-Aufwand deutlich reduzierte.
